name: aetna-precert
description: Aetna commercial precertification packet for an inpatient (POS 21) lumbar fusion. The 'Aetna Choice POS II' letterhead routes the bundle to the 'aetna' payer bucket (spec-v52 §4.5.7) and engages the Aetna commercial overlay. The packet cites the applicable Clinical Policy Bulletin and attaches a clinical note (R-PA-AETNA-001/002 pass), omits any submission-channel reference (R-PA-AETNA-003 info), requests a spinal-fusion procedure without the matching precertification questionnaire / conservative-management documentation (R-PA-AETNA-005 flag), and -- as an inpatient request -- carries no discharge / continuing-care plan for concurrent review (R-PA-AETNA-006 flag, wave 52-7b).

documents.name: aetna-pa-form.txt
documents.text:
Aetna Choice POS II Prior Authorization Request
Patient: Jane A Smith
DOB: 1962-07-14
Member ID: W123456789
Date of service: 2026-06-15
Place of service: 21
Requested procedure: lumbar fusion CPT 22633
Dx: M48.062 lumbar spinal stenosis with neurogenic claudication
Quantity: 1
Ordering provider NPI: 1234567893
Servicing facility NPI: 1306849393
TIN: 123456789
Medical necessity: progressive neurogenic claudication; see Aetna Clinical Policy Bulletin for spinal surgery.
Signature: Ortho Spine MD, 2026-06-01

documents.name: aetna-note.txt
documents.text:
Clinical note
Chief complaint: low back pain with bilateral leg claudication.
History of present illness: eight months of progressively worsening symptoms.
Physical exam: positive straight-leg raise bilaterally.
Assessment and plan: lumbar spinal stenosis; recommend L4-L5 decompression and fusion.
Medical necessity: MRI confirms severe central canal stenosis at L4-L5.
Note date: 2026-06-01
Signed: Ortho Spine MD, 2026-06-01
